languages.text: "Я помог тебе справиться с врагом, техножрица. Как насчет того, чтобы отдать мне анкер-ядро?"
"I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"
languages.original_text: "Я помог тебе справиться с врагом, техножрица. Как насчет того, чтобы отдать мне анкер-ядро?"

traits.locale_text: "I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"
"I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"
"I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest, and I expect a reward. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"
"I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"
"I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"

languages.text: 「敵を討たせてやったのに、報酬は？」
languages.original_text: "I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest, and I expect a reward. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"

traits.locale_text: 「敵を討たせてやったのに、報酬は？」

languages.text: «Le ayudé a eliminar a su enemigo, tecnosacerdotisa. ¿Y si me da el núcleo de anclaje?».
languages.original_text: "I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"

traits.locale_text: «Le ayudé a eliminar a su enemigo, tecnosacerdotisa. ¿Y si me da el núcleo de anclaje?».

languages.text: “我帮你解决了敌人，技术神甫。把锚核给我怎么样？”
languages.original_text: "I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"

traits.locale_text: “我帮你解决了敌人，技术神甫。把锚核给我怎么样？”

languages.text: "Ich habe Euch geholfen, Euren Feind auszuschalten, Techpriesterin. Warum gebt Ihr mir den Ankerkern nicht?"
languages.original_text: "I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe Euch geholfen, Euren Feind auszuschalten, Techpriesterin. Warum gebt Ihr mir den Ankerkern nicht?"

languages.text: "Düşmanınla baş etmene yardım ettim Tekno Rahip. Neden çapa çekirdeğini bana vermiyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"

traits.locale_text: "Düşmanınla baş etmene yardım ettim Tekno Rahip. Neden çapa çekirdeğini bana vermiyorsun?"

languages.text: « Je vous ai aidée à éliminer votre ennemi, technoprêtresse. Pourquoi ne pas me donner le noyau ancestral ? »
languages.original_text: "I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"

traits.locale_text: « Je vous ai aidée à éliminer votre ennemi, technoprêtresse. Pourquoi ne pas me donner le noyau ancestral ? »
